---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the situation where you felt something was missing or painful.
> "As a Copilot user with multiple model subscriptions, I want to…"

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as concrete as possible — UI mockups, API shapes, and config examples are all welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you thought about.

## Affected component(s)

- [ ] Router API (request routing logic)
- [ ] Admin Dashboard (UI / admin API)
- [ ] AI Judge (benchmarking / scoring)
- [ ] VS Code Extension
- [ ] Aspire AppHost / orchestration
- [ ] Evaluation Worker / continuous eval (Phase 8)
- [ ] Docs / onboarding

## Phase context

Which phase (0–8) is this closest to? See [Current Progress](../../docs/Current_Progress.md) and the [PRD](../../docs/PRD.md) for phase definitions.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art, or upstream GitHub Copilot docs.
